articles.title: Battig achieves historic F1 ACADEMY pole on Wild Card debut
articles.summary: Chiara Battig made a sensational start to her debut weekend, making F1 ACADEMY history in Silverstone Qualifying by becoming the first Wild Card driver to earn pole position.

articles.title: What the teams said – Sprint Qualifying in Great Britain

articles.title: Do Ferrari really have the pace to fight for Silverstone victory?

articles.title: Norris explains how car damage impacted his Sprint Qualifying
articles.summary: McLaren had to quickly repair Lando Norris’ front brake duct during Sprint Qualifying at Silverstone.

articles.title: 'I've got to work on everything' – Leclerc after Sprint Qualifying
articles.summary: Charles Leclerc believes he has "got to work on everything" as he was left in only fourth, while Ferrari team mate Lewis Hamilton claimed Sprint pole position ahead of the British Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen admits his P3 ‘could easily have been P6 or P7’
articles.summary: Max Verstappen grabbed an eye-catching P3 in Sprint Qualifying at the British Grand Prix, but the Red Bull driver admitted that the margins were very fine.

articles.title: Antonelli reflects on losing Sprint pole to Hamilton
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli believes "Ferrari have done an incredible step forward", as the Mercedes driver just missed out on pole position in Sprint Qualifying to Lewis Hamilton ahead of the British Grand Prix this weekend.

articles.title: ‘Things aren’t making sense’ – Russell on ‘strange’ lack of pace
articles.summary: George Russell had to settle for P5 in Sprint Qualifying at the British Grand Prix, leaving the Mercedes driver confused over his pace deficit.

articles.title: Hamilton reacts after securing Silverstone Sprint pole
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton pipped Kimi Antonelli to pole position for the Sprint at Silverstone, starting his home race weekend in the best possible way.

articles.title: GP Grã-Bretanha F1, Lando Norris: “Só na última volta é que conseguimos resolver o problema”
